queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and risk mitigation.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of reduced credit default probability associated with minimal savings account balances below 100 DM.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers linked to negative checking account balances and their contribution to lower loan default likelihood.
